title: Create Adventures Together!
description: Modified Modpack to enjoy with friends, explore dungeons, new dimensions, and build a life!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/556a7de2c9c0b1f6804abd8f773b74e57f3c3c8e.png)
A modified modpack to suit the experience friends and I wanted to have, hope you enjoy, and if you also need a server to play with friends:

![Bisect Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2c378fb80e4e5659452cb241f77aa1821197c8c_0.webp)

- ⭐ 150+ Quests
- ⭐ 350+ Mods
- ⭐ 100+ New structures to explore + Overhauled Structures
- ⭐ Make an advanced world with mods like Create and AE2
- ⭐ Resourcepacks to enhance mobs and the player + some blocks
- ⭐ Roleplay aspects! (Minecraft comes Alive, Cosmetics, tons of furniture)
- ⭐ Overhauled World Generation (Geophilic, Biomes o' Plenty, Tree Under Rock)
- ⭐ Fully Optimized with Shader Support!
- ⭐ NEW Bosses and Mobs (Bosses of Mass Destruction, Species, Hamsters)
- ⭐ NEW Dungeons (When Dungeons Arise, AdoraBuild: Structures)
- ⭐ NEW Dimensions (Edenring, AdoraBuild: Structures)
- ⭐ QoL Features such as Waystones, XP Storage, and Mob Lassos
- ⭐ Better mobility with jetpacks, grappling hooks, slime slings, etc!
- ⭐ Xaero's Minimap with Additional Features
- ⭐ Lots of Features for an Improved Experience!

So much more...
